description: Launcher-side package for detecting approved special/name-locked profile inputs before the full client asset catalog is mounted.

source_policy.required_existing_source_hint: approved cleared special/name-lock definitions in main client

notes: This package replaces legacy celebrity-facing wording with publish-safe special/name-lock terminology.
Do not ship real-person name or likeness mappings unless rights, license, parody, or original-character clearance is documented.
This package exists so the launcher owns the detection boundary and the client receives an explicit launch context rather than independently guessing wrapper/profile identity.
